## Summary

Adds deliberate 5s/10s stabilization pauses at every pipeline phase transition and self-chain boundary. The rapid-fire self-chain pattern (workers re-entering within 150ms) was causing thrashing — stale reads, wasted invocations, and ~1 chunk/min instead of parallel processing.

## Scope

**Touches:** `lib/evaluation/processor.ts` — all phase transition and self-chain points.

**Does NOT touch:** LLM calls, chunking logic, artifact schemas, UI, or any other file.

**Delay points added:**
| Location | Delay | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| After Phase 0 → before Phase 1A kick | 5s | DB re-queue write commits |
| After cache load → before batch execution | 5s | DB writes settle |
| After batch completion → before next step | 5s | Cache + pulse writes settle |
| `kickPhase1aWorker()` before HTTP call | 10s | DB commit fully visible to new worker |
| Phase 1A self-chain before kick | 10s | Self-chain DB write propagates |
| Track C self-chain before kick | 10s | Preflight state persists |
| Phase 3 budget self-chain | 10s | Phase 3 state persists |
| Before Phase 2 start | 5s | Phase 1 artifacts committed (replaces old 500ms) |
| Before WAVE gate | 5s | Synthesis artifacts committed |
| Phase 2 → Phase 3 queue for WAVE | 10s | Phase transition visible to next worker |

## Branch Freshness (Never Behind)

Branch-Behind-Base: 0

## Risks & Anomalies

- Total eval time increases by ~30-60s across all phases due to cumulative delays. This is intentional — prevents the thrashing that was wasting minutes of re-entry overhead.
- If delays prove too conservative, `STABILIZE_MS` and `STABILIZE_SELF_CHAIN_MS` constants can be tuned in one place.

---

No-Pipeline-Impact: N/A — this directly improves pipeline stability by preventing self-chain thrashing
